headlines.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice in the second half as Morocco beat co-hosts Canada 3-0 in Houston to book their place in the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco send Canada crashing out of World Cup

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé scored his 19th career World Cup goal, and France survived stifling heat to beat Paraguay 1-0 on Saturday, sending Les Bleus into the quarterfinals for the fourth straight time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé leads France to WCup quarterfinals

headlines.description: Stephen Eustáquio scored in second-half stoppage time, and Canada beat South Africa 1-0 to earn their first knockout match victory in a World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eustáquio heroics send Canada to WCup last-16

headlines.description: Mexico's misery in World Cup opening games was finally ended as they secured a 2-0 win over South Africa at the Estadio Azteca in a match featuring three red cards.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico kick off WC with win over SA ft. 3 red cards

headlines.description: South Korea rallied from 0-1 down to defeat the Czech Republic 2-1 in the second match of the FIFA World Cup 2026.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oh, Hwang goals see South Korea edge Czechia in thriller

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Redouane Halhal (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Ismael Saibari (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari because of an injury.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card.
Richie Laryea (Canada) is shown the yellow card.
Jonathan David (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 1. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Morocco. Sofyan Amrabat replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.
Substitution, Canada. Cyle Larin replaces Tani Oluwaseyi.
Cyle Larin (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Ali Ahmed.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Richie Laryea.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 2. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.
Substitution, Morocco. Marwane Saadane replaces Issa Diop.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Substitution, Canada. Jonathan Osorio replaces Niko Sigur.
Substitution, Canada. Jayden Nelson replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Delay in match because of an injury Promise David (Canada).
Delay in match because of an injury Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 3. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.

play.text: First Half begins.

commentary.text: Ali Ahmed (Canada) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

play.text: Foul by Brahim Díaz (Morocco).

commentary.text: Foul by Brahim Díaz (Morocco).

play.text: Foul by Brahim Díaz (Morocco).

commentary.text: Foul by Tajon Buchanan (Canada).

play.text: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

commentary.text: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

play.text: Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

commentary.text: Corner, Canada. Conceded by Brahim Díaz.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury João Félix (Portugal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, Portugal 0, Spain 0.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.

play.text: First Half begins.

commentary.text: João Neves (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.

play.text: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).

commentary.text: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).

play.text: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).

commentary.text: Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Diogo Costa (Portugal).

play.text: Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Diogo Costa (Portugal).

commentary.text: Attempt missed. João Cancelo (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Nuno Mendes.

play.text: Attempt missed. João Cancelo (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Nuno Mendes.

commentary.text: Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a through ball following a fast break.

play.text: Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Dani Olmo with a through ball following a fast break.

commentary.text: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Pedri.

play.text: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Pedri.

commentary.text: Attempt blocked. Pedro Neto (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

play.text: Attempt blocked. Pedro Neto (Portugal) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Penalty saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
First Half ends, France 0, Morocco 0.
Goal! France 1, Morocco 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Désiré Doué.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Morocco. Sofyan Amrabat replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! France 2, Morocco 0. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, France. Warren Zaïre-Emery replaces Manu Koné.
Substitution, Morocco. Zakaria El Ouahdi replaces Anass Salah-Eddine.
Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Brahim Díaz.
Delay in match because of an injury Kylian Mbappé (France).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, France. Jean-Philippe Mateta replaces Kylian Mbappé because of an injury.
Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Désiré Doué.
Substitution, Morocco. Amine Sbaï replaces Chemsdine Talbi.
Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.
